zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Taylor於1560年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，她的父親Robert Taylor26歲，母親Margaret Graye25歲。她於1584年6月14日與John Moulton在英國諾福爾可姆斯比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1637年11月26日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Taylor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: occupational name for a tailor, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English taillour ‘tailor’ (Old French tailleor, tailleur; Late Latin taliator, from taliare ‘to cut’). The surname is extremely common in Britain and Ireland. In North America, it has absorbed equivalents from other languages, many of which are also common among Ashkenazic Jews, for example German Schneider and Hungarian Szabo . It is also very common among African Americans.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Terrien   ‘owner of a farmland’ or of its altered forms, such as   Therrien   and   Terrian  .

variants.name: Tayloe
meanings: Altered form of English, Scottish, and Irish   Taylor  .

variants.name: Schneider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Franz, Erwin, Fritz, Dieter, Manfred, Heinz, Alois, Ewald, Helmut.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, literally ‘cutter’, from Middle High German snīder, German Schneider, Yiddish shnayder. The same term was sometimes used to denote a woodcutter. This surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Hungary, Poland, and Czechia. In Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is also established in Slavicized forms (see 2 below). In part, Schneider is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare Sneider 1, Snider 1, and Snyder 1.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Šnajdr or Šnajder, and Czech Šneidr, Šneider, Šnejdr, and Šnejder, surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Tailor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Pravin, Dilip, Mahesh, Sanjay, Kanchan, Kaushik, Manilal, Mohanlal, Navnit, Shailesh, Ajay, Alpana.
Indian (Gujarat and Mumbai): mainly Parsi occupational name from the English word tailor.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Taylor was born in 1560, in Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, England, her father, Robert Taylor, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Graye, was 25. She married John Moulton on 14 June 1584, in Hemsby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 26 November 1637, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1637, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ko.Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Taylor(이)가 1560년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Taylor(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Graye(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1584년 6월 14일 영국 노르폴크 헤스비에서 John Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1637년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Taylor родилась в 1560 г. в местности ормесби ст маргарет, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Taylor было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graye, 25. Она умерла 26 ноября 1637 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
